data.title: Analysts Predict Dogecoin Price Will Explode: Why The $1 Mark Is Inevitable
data.description:
Crypto analysts Kaleo and Mags have predicted that the Dogecoin price will witness a parabolic run, with the potential to reach the $1 mark. This comes amid the top meme coin’s downtrend, which puts it at risk of retesting the $0. 2 mark. Dogecoin Price Eyes Parabolic Rally To $1 In an X post, Kaleo declared that the Dogecoin price will rip to new highs from its current level
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-price-will-explode/

data.title: Bitcoin falls under $109K as traders brace for Friday’s $22B BTC options expiry
data.description:
Bitcoin fell to a 3-week low under $109,000, but the $22 billion end-of-month options expiry could lead to a much-needed BTC price bounce.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-falls-under-109k-as-traders-brace-for-friday-s-22b-btc-options-expiry?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Cloudflare CEO Announces NET Dollar Stablecoin for AI Agent Micropayments
data.description:
Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince announced the launch of NET Dollar, a US dollar-backed stablecoin designed for AI agent micropayments on Thursday, planning to deploy it as the payment backbone for autonomous AI systems that book flights, order groceries, and manage calendars without human intervention.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/cloudflare-ceo-announces-net-dollar-stablecoin-for-ai-agent-micropayments/

data.title: India Cracks Down on ‘Alarming’ Digital Payments Fraud With Strict New Rules
data.description:
To combat rising digital payments fraud, the Reserve Bank of India has mandated dynamic authentication for transactions, requiring unique credentials like OTPs for each payment by April 2026.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/india-cracks-down-on-alarming-digital-payments-fraud-with-strict-new-rules/

data.title: CloudFlare enters the stablecoin race with NET dollars
data.description:
Matthew Prince, the CEO of CloudFlare, introduced a new USD-pegged stablecoin called NET Dollar on Thursday. In a post on X, Prince shared the project’s website link, which states that the token will be fully backed 1:1 by US dollars. The new stablecoin will be available soon. NET Dollar to power agentic commerce According to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cloudflare-stablecoin-race-with-net-dollars/

data.title: “From 270 Days to 75”: How the SEC’s Quiet Rule Change Rewires Crypto ETF Timelines
data.description:
A regulatory shift by the United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has quietly redrawn the path to market for crypto exchange-traded funds. On September 17, the Commission adopted new standards that allow certain crypto ETFs to be listed more quickly, bypassing months of case-by-case approval. Previously, each spot ETF required a full review through what […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-etfs-timelines-cut-270-to-75-by-sec/
